targets.rawSql:
WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  ps.price * COALESCE(fx.rate,1) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  (ps.price - b.base_price) * COALESCE(fx.rate,1) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
JOIN v_tracked_baseline_alltime b ON b.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  (ps.price - base.base_price) * COALESCE(fx.rate,1) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
JOIN (
  SELECT
    t0.ticker_id,
    COALESCE(p_prev.price, p_first.price) AS base_price
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker_id FROM price_snapshots) t0
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_prev ON p_prev.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_first ON p_first.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
) base ON base.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE s.status='${status}'
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  (h.quantity * (ps.price - h.avg_cost)) * COALESCE(fx.rate,1) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'

WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - b.base_price) / NULLIF(b.base_price,0)) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN v_tracked_baseline_alltime b ON b.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (

    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()

),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps

    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - base.base_price) / NULLIF(base.base_price,0)) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT
    t0.ticker_id,
    COALESCE(p_prev.price, p_first.price) AS base_price
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker_id FROM price_snapshots) t0
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_prev ON p_prev.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_first ON p_first.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
) base ON base.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE s.status='${status}'
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

SELECT
  t.symbol AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN '${status}'='HOLDING' THEN (h.quantity * ps.price) * COALESCE(fx.rate,1)
    ELSE ps.price * COALESCE(fx.rate,1)
  END AS value
FROM v_ticker_status_multi s
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=s.ticker_id
LEFT JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  GROUP BY ticker_id
) last ON last.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id=last.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date=last.last_ts
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
WHERE s.status='${status}'
ORDER BY value DESC;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date

padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  ps.price * COALESCE(fx.rate,1) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  AND t.symbol IN (${stock:sqlstring})
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_first ON p_first.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
) base ON base.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE s.status='${status}' AND t.symbol IN (${stock:sqlstring})
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - b.base_price) / NULLIF(b.base_price,0)) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN v_tracked_baseline_alltime b ON b.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE 1=1
  AND s.status='${status}'
  AND t.symbol IN (${stock:sqlstring})
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - base.base_price) / NULLIF(base.base_price,0)) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT
    t0.ticker_id,
    COALESCE(p_prev.price, p_first.price) AS base_price
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker_id FROM price_snapshots) t0
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_prev ON p_prev.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_first ON p_first.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
) base ON base.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE s.status='${status}' AND t.symbol IN (${stock:sqlstring})
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

SELECT
  t.symbol AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN '${status}'='HOLDING' THEN (h.quantity * ps.price) * COALESCE(fx.rate,1)
    ELSE ps.price * COALESCE(fx.rate,1)
  END AS value
FROM v_ticker_status_multi s
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=s.ticker_id
LEFT JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  GROUP BY ticker_id
) last ON last.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id=last.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date=last.last_ts
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
WHERE s.status='${status}'
  AND t.symbol IN (${stock:sqlstring})
ORDER BY value DESC;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  t.symbol AS metric,
  100.0 * ((ps.price - b.base_price) / NULLIF(b.base_price,0)) AS value
FROM padded ps
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN v_tracked_baseline_alltime b ON b.ticker_id = t.id
WHERE s.status='${status}'
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date, metric;

list.name: status
list.label: Type
list.query: SELECT 'Holdings' AS __text, 'HOLDING' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT 'Watchlist','WATCHLIST' UNION ALL SELECT 'Sold','SOLD';
list.definition: SELECT 'Holdings' AS __text, 'HOLDING' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT 'Watchlist','WATCHLIST' UNION ALL SELECT 'Sold','SOLD';

list.name: stock
list.label: Symbols
list.query: SELECT symbol FROM v_ticker_status_multi WHERE status='${status}' ORDER BY symbol;
list.definition: SELECT symbol FROM v_ticker_status_multi WHERE status='${status}' ORDER BY symbol;
